problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
